stories.title: Stacking the remaining NBA teams, from 1 to 8: Can...
stories.summary: Who is closest to the 2026 title after all four Game 1s? Tim Bontemps and Vincent Goodwill rerank the full bracket.

stories.title: NBA playoffs intel file: Execs weigh in on a ridic...
stories.summary: After a wild first round, here's what league insiders are talking about as the NBA's conference semifinals begin.

stories.title: PSG holds off Bayern to set up final with Arsenal
stories.summary: PSG edged a thrilling 5-4 game in the first leg in Paris last week, and the defending champions made the advantage count to progress 6-5 on aggregate to set up a final in Budapest against Arsenal on May 30.

stories.title: Embiid out for Game 2 due to multiple injuries
stories.summary: Sixers star Joel Embiid has been ruled out for Game 2 against the Knicks because of ankle and hip injuries.

stories.title: QB Wilson weighing offer from Jets, TV career
stories.summary: Russell Wilson said Wednesday that he is weighing a contract offer from the New York Jets and a post-football career in network television.
